title: The Path to Licence Readiness
alt: Five stages to reach MIA or WDA licence readiness before applying

items.label: Prove, don't document
items.desc: Show records that the system operates, not just written SOPs.

items.label: Define the scope
items.desc: Settle activities and product types first; everything flows from it.

items.label: Build the evidence
items.desc: Live QMS: document control, deviations, CAPA, training, data integrity.

items.label: Premises & named persons
items.desc: Qualified equipment, QP/RP in post with documented authority and deputies.

items.label: Run a mock inspection
items.desc: Independent dry run surfaces gaps before the MHRA does.

items.label: Apply when ready
items.desc: Submit on evidence, not on a deadline.
